subject: Homepage redesign kickoff
body: Hey team, let's align on the homepage redesign direction. I've attached the initial wireframes for review. Please share feedback by end of week.

subject: Design system integration plan
body: I've been reviewing how we can leverage the design system tokens for the website redesign. Let's discuss the integration approach in our next sync.

subject: API v2 breaking changes
body: Heads up — the v2 migration will introduce breaking changes to the auth endpoints. We need to coordinate with frontend to update the client SDK. Let's discuss timeline.

subject: Performance benchmarks for v2
body: I ran initial benchmarks comparing v1 and v2 endpoints. The new pagination approach shows 40% improvement on large datasets. Full report attached.
